# 2026OKINAWA
travel itinerary in Okinawa in 2026
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-Hant">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>沖繩四日行程 ｜ 2026.7.17-7.20</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+TC:wght@500;700;900&family=Noto+Sans+TC:wght@400;500;700&family=Zen+Maru+Gothic:wght@500;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --ocean-deep:#123A52;
    --ocean-mid:#2C7DA0;
    --ocean-light:#A9D6E5;
    --sand:#F5E9D3;
    --sand-deep:#E9D6AE;
    --coral:#E76F51;
    --coral-deep:#C9552F;
    --foam:#FFFDF7;
    --ink:#1B3A4B;
    --line:rgba(27,58,75,0.14);
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    margin:0;
    background:var(--sand);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:"Noto Sans TC","Noto Sans",sans-serif;
    font-size:18px;
    line-height:1.65;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  .gmap{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;
    color:var(--ocean-mid);
    text-decoration:underline;
    text-decoration-thickness:1.5px;
    text-underline-offset:3px;
    font-weight:700;
  }
  .gmap:hover{color:var(--coral-deep);}
  h1,h2,h3{
    font-family:"Noto Serif TC",serif;
    margin:0;
  }
  .num{font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;}
  a{color:inherit;}

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--ocean-deep) 0%,var(--ocean-mid) 55%,var(--ocean-light) 100%);
    color:var(--foam);
    padding:56px 20px 90px;
    overflow:hidden;
    text-align:center;
  }
  .hero::after{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:-1px;height:70px;
    background:var(--sand);
    -webkit-mask-image:url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1200 120" preserveAspectRatio="none"><path d="M0,40 C150,90 350,0 600,40 C850,80 1050,10 1200,50 L1200,120 L0,120 Z" fill="black"/></svg>');
    mask-image:url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1200 120" preserveAspectRatio="none"><path d="M0,40 C150,90 350,0 600,40 C850,80 1050,10 1200,50 L1200,120 L0,120 Z" fill="black"/></svg>');
    -webkit-mask-size:100% 100%;
    mask-size:100% 100%;
  }
  .shisa{width:104px;height:auto;margin:0 auto 6px;display:block;}
  .eyebrow{
    letter-spacing:0.35em;
    font-size:14px;
    font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;
    color:var(--ocean-light);
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(44px,10vw,76px);
    font-weight:900;
    letter-spacing:0.03em;
    color:var(--foam);
    text-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
  }
  .hero .sub{
    margin-top:10px;
    font-size:23px;
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--sand);
  }
  .hero .dates{
    margin-top:4px;
    font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;
    font-size:16px;
    letter-spacing:0.1em;
    color:var(--ocean-light);
  }

  /* boarding pass */
  .pass{
    max-width:520px;
    margin:34px auto 0;
    background:var(--foam);
    color:var(--ink);
    border-radius:16px;
    display:flex;
    text-align:left;
    box-shadow:0 20px 40px rgba(9,30,44,0.35);
    position:relative;
  }
  .pass-main{flex:1;padding:18px 16px;}
  .pass-stub{
    width:96px;
    background:var(--coral);
    color:var(--foam);
    border-radius:0 16px 16px 0;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:13px;
    gap:4px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .pass::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;
    right:96px;top:0;bottom:0;
    width:0;
    border-left:2px dashed rgba(27,58,75,0.25);
  }
  .pass-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:6px;}
  .pass-label{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:0.15em;color:var(--ocean-mid);font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;}
  .pass-code{font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:25px;color:var(--ocean-deep);}
  .pass-flight{font-size:15px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:500;}
  .pass-airline{font-size:14px;color:var(--ocean-mid);margin-bottom:8px;font-weight:700;}
  .pass-stub small{font-size:11px;opacity:0.85;}

  /* ---------- SECTION WRAP ---------- */
  section{max-width:760px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 20px;}
  .section-title{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    margin:56px 0 20px;
  }
  .section-title .shisa-mini{width:34px;height:auto;flex:none;}
  .section-title h2{font-size:27px;color:var(--ocean-deep);font-weight:700;}

  /* ---------- NOTICE CARDS ---------- */
  .notice-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(210px,1fr));gap:14px;}
  .notice-card{
    background:var(--foam);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:16px 16px 16px 18px;
    border-left:5px solid var(--coral);
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(18,58,82,0.08);
    font-size:16px;
  }
  .notice-card:nth-child(2){border-left-color:var(--ocean-mid);}
  .notice-card:nth-child(3){border-left-color:var(--ocean-deep);}

  /* ---------- DINING ---------- */
  .dining-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:14px;}
  .dining-card{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--ocean-deep),var(--ocean-mid));
    color:var(--foam);
    border-radius:16px;
    padding:18px 20px;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .dining-card .tag{
    font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;
    font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.1em;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    display:inline-block;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;margin-bottom:8px;
  }
  .dining-card h3{font-size:21px;color:var(--foam);margin-bottom:4px;}
  .dining-card .plat{font-size:14px;color:var(--sand);opacity:0.9;}

  /* ---------- DAY NAV ---------- */
  .day-nav{
    position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;
    display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:6px;
    background:rgba(245,233,211,0.92);
    backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
    padding:10px 12px;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .day-nav a{
    font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;
    font-size:14px;font-weight:700;
    color:var(--ocean-deep);
    background:var(--foam);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:6px 14px;border-radius:20px;
    text-decoration:none;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .day-nav a:hover{background:var(--ocean-light);}

  /* ---------- DAY BLOCK ---------- */
  .day-block{scroll-margin-top:64px;margin-top:64px;}
  .day-head{
    display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:16px;
    padding:22px 22px 20px;
    border-radius:20px 20px 0 0;
    color:var(--foam);
    position:relative;
  }
  .day-head .day-num{
    font-family:"Noto Serif TC",serif;
    font-weight:900;
    font-size:56px;
    line-height:0.8;
    opacity:0.9;
  }
  .day-head .day-info h3{font-size:23px;color:var(--foam);margin-bottom:4px;}
  .day-head .day-info .outfit{
    font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;
    font-size:14px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    display:inline-block;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;
  }
  .d1{background:linear-gradient(120deg,#0F3350,#2C7DA0);}
  .d2{background:linear-gradient(120deg,#1B7A8C,#3FA9BE);}
  .d3{background:linear-gradient(120deg,#C9552F,#E76F51);}
  .d4{background:linear-gradient(120deg,#6B7A8F,#98A9BC);}

  .day-body{
    background:var(--foam);
    border-radius:0 0 20px 20px;
    padding:26px 22px 30px;
    box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(18,58,82,0.10);
  }
  .timeline{position:relative;padding-left:26px;}
  .timeline::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;left:6px;top:6px;bottom:6px;width:2px;
    background-image:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,var(--ocean-light) 0 6px,transparent 6px 12px);
  }
  .t-item{position:relative;margin-bottom:22px;}
  .t-item:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}
  .t-item::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;left:-26px;top:4px;
    width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--coral);
    box-shadow:0 0 0 4px var(--foam),0 0 0 5px var(--line);
  }
  .t-time{
    font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;
    font-weight:700;font-size:16px;color:var(--ocean-deep);
    margin-right:8px;
  }
  .t-text{font-size:18px;font-weight:500;}
  .t-note{
    margin-top:6px;
    background:var(--sand);
    border-radius:10px;
    padding:10px 12px;
    font-size:15px;
    color:var(--ink);
  }
  .t-note ul{margin:6px 0 0;padding-left:18px;}
  .t-note li{margin-bottom:3px;}

  /* accordion for parco */
  details.floor{
    margin-top:6px;
    background:var(--sand);
    border-radius:10px;
    padding:8px 12px;
  }
  details.floor summary{
    cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--ocean-deep);
    font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif;
  }
  details.floor p{margin:8px 0 2px;font-size:15px;}

  /* ---------- MAP / ROUTE ---------- */
  .route{
    background:var(--foam);
    border-radius:20px;
    padding:26px 22px;
    box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(18,58,82,0.10);
    position:relative;
  }
  .route-map-img{
    width:100%;
    border-radius:14px;
    display:block;
    margin-bottom:24px;
    box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(18,58,82,0.12);
  }
  .route-line{position:relative;padding-left:30px;}
  .route-line::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;left:9px;top:8px;bottom:8px;width:3px;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--ocean-deep),var(--coral));
    border-radius:3px;
  }
  .r-item{position:relative;margin-bottom:20px;font-size:16px;}
  .r-item:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}
  .r-item::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;left:-30px;top:2px;
    width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--ocean-mid);
    border:3px solid var(--foam);
    box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--ocean-mid);
  }
  .r-item.stay::before{background:var(--coral);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--coral);}
  .r-item .r-label{font-weight:700;}
  .r-item.stay .r-label{color:var(--coral-deep);}
  .r-item .r-sub{font-size:14px;color:var(--ocean-mid);}

  footer{
    text-align:center;
    padding:60px 20px 50px;
    color:var(--ocean-mid);
    font-size:15px;
  }
  footer .shisa{width:40px;height:40px;opacity:0.8;}

  @media(max-width:480px){
    .day-head{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;}
    .day-head .day-num{font-size:44px;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ============ HERO ============ -->
<div class="hero">
  <img class="shisa" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="沖繩石獅">
  <div class="eyebrow">OKINAWA TRAVEL GUIDE</div>
  <h1>沖繩</h1>
  <div class="sub">四天三夜 慢活行前手冊</div>
  <div class="dates">2026 . 7 . 17 — 7 . 20</div>

  <div class="pass">
    <div class="pass-main">
      <div class="pass-airline">中華航空 CHINA AIRLINES</div>
      <div class="pass-row">
        <span class="pass-code">TPE → OKA</span>
        <span class="pass-label">CI0120</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pass-flight">7/17（五）08:00 起飛 － 10:45 抵達</div>
      <div style="height:10px;"></div>
      <div class="pass-row">
        <span class="pass-code">OKA → TPE</span>
        <span class="pass-label">CI0121</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pass-flight">7/20（一）11:55 起飛 － 12:30 抵達</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pass-stub">
      <span>GO</span>
      <small>沖繩</small>
      <small>✈︎</small>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ============ DAY NAV ============ -->
<div class="day-nav">
  <a href="#notice">須知</a>
  <a href="#day1">Day 1</a>
  <a href="#day2">Day 2</a>
  <a href="#day3">Day 3</a>
  <a href="#day4">Day 4</a>
  <a href="#map">地圖</a>
</div>

<!-- ============ NOTICE ============ -->
<section id="notice">
  <div class="section-title">
    <img class="shisa-mini" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="石獅">
    <h2>行前注意事項</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="notice-grid">
    <div class="notice-card"><b>金飾請取下</b><br>日本海關對黃金管制嚴格，為避免麻煩不要配戴金飾。</div>
    <div class="notice-card"><b>必備小物</b><br>務必攜帶泳衣、防曬乳、拖鞋，浮潛與海灘行程都用得上。</div>
    <div class="notice-card"><b>旅遊三不原則</b><br>不催促、不生氣、不嫌棄，一起維護這趟旅程的好心情。</div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title">
    <img class="shisa-mini" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="石獅">
    <h2>已訂位餐廳</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="dining-grid">
    <div class="dining-card">
      <span class="tag">7/17 · 18:30</span>
      <h3>読谷酒場美海</h3>
      <div class="plat">訂位平台：Retty（透過 Google 預約）</div>
    </div>
    <div class="dining-card">
      <span class="tag">7/19 · 17:30</span>
      <h3>燒肉本部牧場 國際通店</h3>
      <div class="plat">訂位平台：Tablecheck</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ DAY 1 ============ -->
<div class="day-block" id="day1">
  <div class="day-head d1">
    <div class="day-num num">01</div>
    <div class="day-info">
      <h3>當地海鮮市場・熟悉自駕</h3>
      <span class="outfit">穿著建議：舒適、適合拍照</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <section class="day-body">
    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">10:45</span><span class="t-text">抵達沖繩<a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E9%82%A3%E9%9C%B8%E6%A9%9F%E5%A0%B4" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍那霸機場</a></span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">12:00</span><span class="t-text">租車，展開自駕行程</span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">12:30</span><span class="t-text">午餐：<a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E6%B3%8A%E6%B8%AF%E9%AD%9A%E5%B8%82%E5%A0%B4%20%E6%B2%96%E7%B9%A9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍泊港市場</a></span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">14:00</span><span class="t-text"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E6%B3%A2%E4%B8%8A%E5%AE%AE" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍波上宮</a></span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">18:30</span><span class="t-text">晚餐：<a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E8%AA%AD%E8%B0%B7%E9%85%92%E5%A0%B4%E7%BE%8E%E6%B5%B7" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍読谷酒場美海</a></span>
        <div class="t-note">已預約訂位（Retty / Google）</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<!-- ============ DAY 2 ============ -->
<div class="day-block" id="day2">
  <div class="day-head d2">
    <div class="day-num num">02</div>
    <div class="day-info">
      <h3>慢活浮潛海岸線・美國村異國風情</h3>
      <span class="outfit">穿著建議：輕便、適合拍照、拖鞋</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <section class="day-body">
    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">09:30</span><span class="t-text"><a class="gmap" href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/4f7y8ZFRuP8191tu7" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍黑潮潛水</a>浮潛／逛<a class="gmap" href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/V3vE1EmiPMnmL9Pq5" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍當地超市</a>or<a class="gmap" href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/p3ceLPHc1Gi8PFMV8" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍咖啡廳</a></span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">12:30</span><span class="t-text">回民宿享用 local 午餐 &amp; 午休</span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">15:30</span><span class="t-text"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E6%AE%98%E6%B3%A2%E5%B2%AC%E5%85%AC%E5%9C%92" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍殘波岬公園</a>／海灘</span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">18:00</span><span class="t-text"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E7%BE%8E%E5%9C%8B%E6%9D%91%20%E6%B2%96%E7%B9%A9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍美國村</a></span>
        <div class="t-note">
          先到 <b>Taco Rice Café</b> candidate 候位<br>
          視等待時間，可先去拍夕陽、或先吃豬肉蛋飯糰<br>
          吃飽逛街，等待 20:00 煙火
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<!-- ============ DAY 3 ============ -->
<div class="day-block" id="day3">
  <div class="day-head d3">
    <div class="day-num num">03</div>
    <div class="day-info">
      <h3>轉入熱鬧那霸市區・購物日</h3>
      <span class="outfit">穿著建議：好走的鞋、帶試穿的襪子</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <section class="day-body">
    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">10:00</span><span class="t-text"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Parco%20City%20%E6%B2%96%E7%B9%A9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍Parco City</a></span>
        <div class="t-note">
          <details class="floor">
            <summary>3F　Uniqlo・ABC-Mart・Lawson・Skechers・Jins・石竹・西村</summary>
          </details>
          <details class="floor">
            <summary>2F　ABC-Mart・Owndays・sabon・coach・ZARA・The North Face・Polo</summary>
          </details>
          <details class="floor">
            <summary>1F　松本清・扭蛋萬代（退稅櫃檯在 1F）</summary>
          </details>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">15:30</span><span class="t-text">還車，飯店 Check in</span>
        <div class="t-note"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=GRAND%20STAY%20ASAHIBASHI%20EKIMAE" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍住宿：GRAND STAY ASAHIBASHI EKIMAE</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">17:00</span><span class="t-text"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E5%9C%8B%E9%9A%9B%E9%80%9A%20%E6%B2%96%E7%B9%A9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍國際通</a></span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">17:30</span><span class="t-text">晚餐：<a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E7%87%92%E8%82%89%E6%9C%AC%E9%83%A8%E7%89%A7%E5%A0%B4%20%E5%9C%8B%E9%9A%9B%E9%80%9A%E5%BA%97" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍燒肉本部牧場 國際通店</a></span>
        <div class="t-note">已預約訂位（Tablecheck）</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<!-- ============ DAY 4 ============ -->
<div class="day-block" id="day4">
  <div class="day-head d4">
    <div class="day-num num">04</div>
    <div class="day-info">
      <h3>搭機日～</h3>
      <span class="outfit">穿著建議：搭機舒適就好</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <section class="day-body">
    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">08:00</span><span class="t-text">早餐：<a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E4%B8%80%E8%98%AD%E6%8B%89%E9%BA%B5%20%E6%B2%96%E7%B9%A9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍一蘭拉麵</a></span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">09:30</span><span class="t-text">前往機場</span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">09:50</span><span class="t-text">抵達<a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E9%82%A3%E9%9C%B8%E6%A9%9F%E5%A0%B4" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍那霸機場</a>，報到、逛免稅店</span></div>
      <div class="t-item"><span class="t-time">11:55</span><span class="t-text">登機 ／ 12:30 抵達台灣</span></div>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<!-- ============ MAP ============ -->
<section id="map">
  <div class="section-title">
    <img class="shisa-mini" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="石獅">
    <h2>景點地圖</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="route">
    <img class="route-map-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="沖繩景點地圖原始版本">
    <div style="font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic',sans-serif;font-weight:700;color:var(--ocean-mid);font-size:14px;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-bottom:14px;">點下方地點名稱可直接開啟 Google Maps</div>
    <div class="route-line">
      <div class="r-item"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/4f7y8ZFRuP8191tu7" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍黑潮潛水（浮潛）</a></div></div>
      <div class="r-item stay"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=BALMY%20OCEAN%20OKINAWA" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍BALMY OCEAN OKINAWA</a></div><div class="r-sub">住宿・Day1-2</div></div>
      <div class="r-item"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E6%AE%98%E6%B3%A2%E5%B2%AC" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍殘波岬</a></div></div>
      <div class="r-item"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/V3vE1EmiPMnmL9Pq5" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍24 小時超市</a></div></div>
      <div class="r-item"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E7%BE%8E%E5%9C%8B%E6%9D%91%20%E6%B2%96%E7%B9%A9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍美國村</a></div></div>
      <div class="r-item"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E6%B3%8A%E6%B8%AF%E9%AD%9A%E5%B8%82%E5%A0%B4%20%E6%B2%96%E7%B9%A9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍泊港市場</a></div></div>
      <div class="r-item"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Parco%20City%20%E6%B2%96%E7%B9%A9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍Parco City</a></div></div>
      <div class="r-item"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E6%B3%A2%E4%B8%8A%E5%AE%AE" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍波上宮</a></div></div>
      <div class="r-item stay"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=GRAND%20STAY%20ASAHIBASHI%20EKIMAE" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍GRAND STAY ASAHIBASHI EKIMAE</a></div><div class="r-sub">住宿・Day3</div></div>
      <div class="r-item"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E5%9C%8B%E9%9A%9B%E9%80%9A%20%E6%B2%96%E7%B9%A9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍國際通</a></div><div class="r-sub">燒肉本部牧場・一蘭拉麵・唐吉訶德</div></div>
      <div class="r-item"><div class="r-label"><a class="gmap" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%E9%82%A3%E9%9C%B8%E6%A9%9F%E5%A0%B4" target="_blank" rel="noopener">📍那霸機場</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <img class="shisa" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="石獅" style="width:64px;">
  <div>祝我們沖繩玩得開心，海浪與陽光都準時赴約 🌊</div>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
